title: Home Renovation Calculator - Remodel Cost Estimator
description: Free home renovation cost calculator. Estimate remodeling costs for kitchen, bathroom, flooring, and other home improvement projects.
keywords: home renovation calculator, remodel cost calculator, renovation estimate, home improvement cost, kitchen remodel cost
intro: Estimate your home renovation costs. Select project types and quality level to get a detailed cost breakdown.

faq.q: How much does a kitchen remodel cost?
faq.a: A minor kitchen remodel costs $15,000-$30,000. A major remodel runs $40,000-$80,000+. Average ROI is 60-80%.

faq.q: How much does a bathroom remodel cost?
faq.a: A bathroom remodel typically costs $10,000-$30,000 depending on size and finishes. Average ROI is 60-70%.

faq.q: What renovations add the most value?
faq.a: Kitchen and bathroom remodels, adding a deck, replacing the garage door, and new siding typically offer the best ROI.
